untranslatable_reason: Beta calculation and decile-based portfolio construction are not available in the allowed indicators list. This is a factor-based strategy requiring custom beta computation and cross-sectional ranking/sorting logic that exceeds the scope of technical indicator-based conditions. Allowed indicators are price-based technical indicators; beta is a statistical measure requiring time-series regression analysis.
translation_notes: Signal requires: (1) computation of market beta via regression, (2) cross-sectional sorting of securities by beta, (3) decile formation and rebalancing logic. None of these operations are supported by the allowed technical indicators (price, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger Bands, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, pivots, volume ratios, z-scores, returns). Implementation would require a custom factor module or external beta data feed.
